mano_cua.result_summary: 中文输入法选中文本后输入失败：IME 组合模式正常激活，候选字正常显示，但确认输入后中文字符未插入且选中文本未被替换。仅光标位置（无选中文本）输入中文正常。编辑器未正确处理 compositionend 事件。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Chinese characters '你好' successfully inserted at cursor position (no selection). But when text is selected, Chinese IME input fails to replace selected text - IME composition popup appears and candidates show correctly, but confirming the selection does not insert characters or replace selected text. Confirmed functional bug in compositionend event handling.
